name: GPT-5.1
archDisplay: GPT-5 upgrade with adaptive reasoning spanning Instant and Thinking behavior in one model; dense transformer, exact size undisclosed
note: Warmer, more conversational refresh with adaptive reasoning; Instant and Thinking modes.

results.notes: SWE-bench Verified, Thinking mode; literally confirmed on cited page
AIME 2025, Thinking mode; literally confirmed on cited page

verificationNotes: Existence, Nov 12 2025 release, 400K context, and $1.25/$10 pricing all confirmed directly via developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5.1 and openai.com/index/gpt-5-1/. SWE-bench (76.3) and AIME (94) confirmed literally on the cited claude5.com page. Dropped the GPQA-Diamond row (86.6, sourced to artificialanalysis.ai/evaluations/gpqa-diamond): that live leaderboard page no longer lists GPT-5.1 (superseded), and a different tracker (aireleasetracker.com) reports 88.1 for the same metric — could not confirm 86.6 on the cited page and found a conflicting number elsewhere, so removed per instructions.
